Canoe Rentals at Disney's Fort Wilderness Resort and Campground
LocatedinWalt Disney World® Resort
Discover adventure around every bend as you explore nearby inlets and waterways.
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
No times available.
Canoe Rentals
Set off on your own excursion along the tranquil waters of Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort.
Rental location: The Bike Barn at the Meadow Recreation Area
Hours: 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM daily
Price: $10 per 30 minutes (taxes not included)
Important Details
Reservations are not required.
Rentals are available on a first-come, first-served basis.
Guests must be 18 years of age or over and will need to present a valid driver's license, state-issued ID or Military ID to rent a canoe.
A parent or guardian over 18 years of age can also sign for a minor 12 and up to rent a canoe on their own.
Onboard smoking is not permitted.
Complimentary life jackets must be worn.
During peak times of the year, only Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort Guests or Guests with dining or recreation reservations may be allowed to enter the Resort hotel area to park.
Call the Bike Barn at (407) 824-2932 for more information. Guests younger than 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call.
